Introduction.script: The work introduces BERT, a transformer model trained with bidirectional context.
bullet_points: Words are modeled using both left and right context.

Methodology.script: Its pre-training combines masked language modeling with next sentence prediction before downstream fine-tuning.
bullet_points: The model is adapted to many tasks after large-scale pre-training.

Results.script: BERT achieves strong benchmark performance on tasks including GLUE and SQuAD.
bullet_points: The results show broad gains across language understanding tasks.

Discussion.script: A major contribution is showing that one pre-trained model can transfer well with little task-specific redesign.

Conclusion.script: The paper shows that deep bidirectional pre-training can significantly improve NLP systems.
bullet_points: BERT became an influential foundation model for later work.
